root_cause_hypothesis: PASS on all three scored dimensions. Secondary (non-blocking) finding: the READ side of configuration keys does not see freshly created keys. After d365fo_file(action=create) + update_symbol_index(filePath) for both keys, get_object_info(objectType="config-key", ConDemoIsvSuiteReportsKey) reports 'Parent chain: - (root key)', no Label and no LicenseCode, while the same reader renders the full chain for platform keys (MCRCallCenter -> RetailChannels -> Retail). A bridge/cache refresh (update_symbol_index with no filePath) does not fix it. The on-disk XML does carry <ParentKey>/<LicenseCode> and xppc validated both links (a dangling ParentKey is a build error), so this is an indexing/read gap, not a writer defect - but it is a false negative that could steer a follow-up agent to 'repair' a correct ParentKey. Also confirmed fixed from the previous run: the writer no longer defaults PublicKey; PublicKey=700 was passed explicitly and built clean.
suggested_fix_area: src/indexing (config-key incremental indexer: update_symbol_index inserts only the name symbol, not the Label/ParentKey/LicenseCode hierarchy rows the config-key reader joins on); secondary: eval harness note that ContosoDemo.rnrproj is invalid XML so addToProject must be false
